speaker: Zach Goodbody
policy: Reusable mentor responses must support the player's decision without claiming ownership of the player's company or replacing task captions.

clips.use: Before material, tooling, inspection, or route decisions
After repeated uncertainty without an unsafe condition
When setup state is incomplete or potentially unsafe
After the player fixes the process
Before deeper teaching or a follow-up explanation
At job pause, shift change, or delegation
Before purchases, quotes, and expansion decisions
When the player opens mentor help
After Zach provides contextual next-step help
